title: helichrysum ellipticifolium
intro: Helichrysum ellipticifolium, also known as the yellow mountain paperflower, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum ellipticifolium include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting wound healing and skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
